title: phlox subulata
intro: Phlox subulata, also known as creeping phlox or moss phlox, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen perennial plant native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phlox subulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe skin irritations. Phlox subulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
